# Test video-download command validation
# The video-download command downloads video file (requires --direct-rpc flag)
# Requires: <notebook-id> [filename]

# === VIDEO-DOWNLOAD COMMAND ===
# Test video-download without arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test video-download
stderr 'usage: nlm video-download <notebook-id> \[filename\]'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test video-download with valid single argument (should require auth)
! exec ./nlm_test video-download notebook123
stderr 'Authentication required'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test video-download with both arguments (should require auth)
! exec ./nlm_test video-download notebook123 output.mp4
stderr 'Authentication required'
! stderr 'panic'

# Test video-download with too many arguments (should fail with usage)
! exec ./nlm_test video-download notebook123 output.mp4 extra
stderr 'usage: nlm video-download <notebook-id> \[filename\]'
! stderr 'panic'
